Branding-only scope, nothing else:

1. Replace old brand text in bridge docs, package metadata, labels, comments, and URLs.  
2. Rename old-branded bridge names (`Polygon*`, `Matic*`) in files/contracts/interfaces, while leaving `bor` and `heimdall` names unchanged.  
3. Update all imports, paths, scripts, tests, and generated references to those new names.  
4. Regenerate bridge derived files (`flat/`, generated interfaces/artifacts) so old names are not left behind.  
5. Verify with bridge-only grep and bridge compile checks.

No chain credentials, no chain config, no tokenomics.
